offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, expense policy violations cause payroll discrepancies. We monitor violations and alert payroll ops instead of manual tracking of expenses and policy adherence.
problem: Expense policy violations leading to payroll discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demos
Participate in forums for accounting tools sharing
try_it: Let users try weekly reports and real-time alerts for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
